Starting Fresh

How It Works

Step 1

Step 1

Ready

Tell us aaaall about your dog. It helps us recommend a meal plan customized for their nutritional requirements and taste preferences.

Step 2

Step 2

Set

Our team prepares and portions your pup’s meals in our Nashville kitchens, according to their unique caloric needs.

Step 3

Step 3

Nom

Gently cooked food is delivered to your door based on a schedule you set. Your dog does the dinnertime happy dance.

Just The FAQ’s

View All FAQs
What do you mean by “gently cooked” dog food?
Each ingredient, from our proteins to our vegetables to our starches, is gently cooked separately to ensure that it maintains its optimal nutrient capacity and digestibility. There are no high temp vats or extrusion methods used. Just real, whole food ingredients thoughtfully prepared in small batches.
Who develops your dog food recipes?
Our recipes are formulated and scientifically evaluated for nutritional balance by board-certified veterinary nutritionists, who think about the nutritional needs of dogs and how they can be met at any given life stage.
What ingredients and nutrients do you use in your dog food?
We use only real, premium ingredients, prepared and packed in our own Nashville kitchen, along with a proprietary nutrient blend to ensure meals are complete and balanced. This blend was developed by board-certified veterinary nutritionists and a PhD-led veterinary science team, and includes Vitamin D, Vitamin E, Vitamin B1, Vitamin B2, Vitamin B12, Iron, Iodine, Zinc, Selenium, Copper, Manganese, Choline and Taurine. Learn more.
Where is your dog food made?
Meals are prepared in our kitchen facilities in Nashville. We never outsource your dog’s nutrition to third parties. We believe in taking responsibility for each step of the dog food making process so we can maintain oversight and quality. That’s why we inspect every ingredient and rigorously test for safety, to provide high quality meals from small, made-to-order batches.
Can I reschedule orders or cancel my account?
You can reschedule orders or cancel your dog’s Nom Nom subscription in your account, by contacting us by email or by calling/texting (415) 991-0669.
